text.en: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
I used to hate facial hair, but then it grew on me.
I'm reading a book about anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.
The future, the present, and the past walked into a bar. Things got a little tense.
A bicycle can't stand on its own because it's two-tired.
I didn't believe my dad was a road construction worker, but when I went to visit him, all the signs were there.
What do you call a fake noodle? An impasta.
I used to be a banker, but I lost interest.
The rotation of Earth really makes my day.
I told my doctor I broke my arm in two places. He told me to stop going to those places.
The person who invented knock-knock jokes should get a no-bell prize.
Time flies like an arrow. Fruit flies like a banana.
I'm writing a book about reverse psychology. Please don't buy it.
Nothing ruins a Friday more than an understanding that today is Tuesday.
My bed is a magical place where I suddenly remember everything I forgot to do.
The quickest way to double your money is to fold it in half and put it back in your pocket.
Why do they call it rush hour when nothing moves?
Adults are just kids with money and back pain.
The first five days after the weekend are always the hardest.
Common sense is like deodorant. The people who need it most never use it.
Why do we park in driveways and drive on parkways?
The shinbone is a device for finding furniture in a dark room.
A bus station is where a bus stops. A train station is where a train stops. On my desk, I have a work station.
My grandpa started walking five miles a day when he was sixty. He's ninety-seven now, and we have no idea where he is.
There are three kinds of people in the world: those who can count, and those who can't.
Hospitality is making your guests feel at home, even if you wish they were.
I haven't slept for ten days, because that would be too long.
I used to think I was indecisive. But now I'm not so sure.
I have an inferiority complex, but it's not a very good one.
Outside of a dog, a book is man's best friend. Inside of a dog, it's too dark to read.
I want to die peacefully in my sleep, like my grandfather. Not screaming and yelling like the passengers in his car.
My fake plants died because I did not pretend to water them.
Nostalgia isn't what it used to be.
I went to buy some camouflage trousers the other day, but I couldn't find any.
I went to a restaurant that serves breakfast at any time. So I ordered French toast during the Renaissance.
I can't believe I got fired from the calendar factory. All I did was take a day off.
I have a lot of growing up to do. I realized that the other day inside my fort.
I couldn't figure out why the baseball kept getting bigger. Then it hit me.
Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth.
The trouble with having an open mind, of course, is that people will insist on coming along and trying to put things in it.
Do not take life too seriously. You will never get out of it alive.
The road to success is always under construction.
Age is something that doesn't matter, unless you are a cheese.
By the time a man realizes that his father was right, he has a son who thinks he's wrong.
The early bird might get the worm, but the second mouse gets the cheese.
A diplomat is someone who can tell you to go to hell in such a way that you actually look forward to the trip.
Experience is a wonderful thing. It enables you to recognize a mistake when you make it again.
If at first you don't succeed, then skydiving definitely isn't for you.
I intend to live forever. So far, so good.
Knowledge is knowing a tomato is a fruit. Wisdom is not putting it in a fruit salad.
